channel.title: LiaScript: Authors on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in LiaScript: Authors on LiaScript

item.title: André Dietrich
item.description: Originally a robotics and embedded software developer now working as a researcher at the Technical University Bergakademie in Freiberg. The current research interests are language design, new web technologies and online education with focus on open educational resources.

item.title: Sebastian Zug
item.description: Sebastian Zug is a Professor at the TU Bergakademie Freiberg. His research interests are focused on outdoor robotics and self-describing, intelligent components.
